summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Advalora Consulting landing page completed end-to-end against the public preview URL. 7/7 backend pytest cases passed and all 13 frontend Playwright flows passed (header, hero, pain points, services, approach, founder, FAQ, header CTA scroll, footer links, lead form validation, lead form submission with MongoDB persistence, mobile menu open/close).
critical_code_review_comments: Email domain in constants.js is 'advaloraconuslting.com' (note 'u' before 's') — this matches the original problem statement verbatim, but it is almost certainly a typo of 'advaloraconsulting.com'. Recommend confirming with the user before launch; otherwise mailto links will be undeliverable.

Empty-form toast.error path in Landing.jsx is unreachable in normal browsers because all required inputs carry the HTML5 `required` attribute, which natively blocks submission before the JS check runs. The form IS correctly prevented from submitting, but the spec line 'submitting empty form shows error toast' is satisfied by browser-native validation instead of the sonner toast. Either remove the `required` attribute (to surface the toast) or remove the dead toast.error branch.

logger is initialized AFTER it is first referenced inside create_lead (line 61 uses logger, but logging.basicConfig/logger are defined at lines 84-88, AFTER app.include_router). This works only because the route handler runs later, but the ordering is fragile — move logging setup to top of file.
No rate limiting / captcha on POST /api/leads — public endpoint vulnerable to spam. Consider hCaptcha or simple rate limit before production.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject; not breaking now since no cookies are sent, but tighten origins for production.
test_credentials: none — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Test leads created via POST /api/leads with TEST_ / playwright_ prefixed names and unique uuid emails; not cleaned up (no DELETE endpoint exists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_leads_api.py covers root + lead CRUD-create + list + validation (422 cases). Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Frontend data-testids in use: site-header, brand-mark, nav-{pain-points|services|approach|expertise|faq}, hero-cta-primary, hero-cta-whatsapp, header-cta, header-whatsapp, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, mobile-cta, pain-item-0..3, service-card-0..5, approach-step-0..3, founder-image, founder-linkedin, founder-email, faq-accordion, faq-item-0..4, contact-section, lead-form, lead-input-{name,role,company,email,phone,challenge}, lead-submit, lead-success, lead-submit-another, footer-email, footer-whatsapp, footer-linkedin. Email domain spelling 'advaloraconuslting.com' is intentional per user spec (likely typo).
